title: Ouchies - Injuries mod
body:
While this mod is customizeable through gamerules, this is still made to be a realistic and difficult mod on default settings. I'm not going to tone down the default difficulty (unless it's obviously flawed), but I am willing to add gamerules for more things. Thank you!

Ouchies is a realistic injury mod, made to be customizable for any player's needs. Disable features or tone the difficulty down as you like - it's your world!
Ouchies will have many features, but the current notable ones are:

• Bleeding system - bleed when taking damage

• Break your legs (MY LEG!!!)

• Infections for when you bleed (for 1.1.0 and above). Make sure to disinfect them, or else you could be in for a hell of a bad time.

• Blood particles for mobs when they get hit (or bones)

Check out the Gallery for more!
